text.text: Odlična ordinacija i još bolji tim! Od prvog pregleda do završetka sve je bilo na vrhunskom nivou. Profesionalni, precizni, smireni i nevjerovatno posvećeni svakom detalju. Atmosfera je prijatna, prostor čist i moderan, a pristup pacijentu topao i pun razumijevanja. Rezultat je doslovno savršen – prirodan, elegantan i baš onakav kakav sam željela. Prezadovoljna sam i od srca preporučujem!

text.text:
Sto da napisem kao netko ko je umirao od straha na samu pomisao poci u stomatologa na pregled, a kamoli ugraditi 5 implatanata odjednom?‼️ PA KRENIMO...
Ovi doktori prvenstveno su ljudi ❤️❤️ koji su mi dostupni doslovno 24h za bilo kakva pitanja, intervencije, bolove, pa prijatelji pa tek onda sve titule za sve ono sto rade. Taj osjecaj opustenosti, mirnoce...
❕️Moja prica je pocela jos davne 2019. I nastavlja se sada s ugradnjon implatanata na donju celjust.‼️ Na prvu me osvojio docek osoblja, a onda cistoca i sterilnost ordinacije.
🤍❕️🤍❕️Zahvat odraden lakocom uz profesionalne ljude dr. N.Kovacevic i dr.S.Kovacevic-Ozegovic‼️ BEZ POPIJENE TABLETE IZA ZAHVATA!!!! ‼️ Moje putovanje se nastavlja i dalje bez imalo treme i straja i bojazni za zube.

SVAKOME BIH PREPORUCILA OVE DIVNE LJUDE ZA SVE ONE KOJI UMIRU OD STRAHA ZVUKA BUSILICE ILI IMAJU SINDROM BIJELE KUTE KAO JA!!!🦷🤍

text.text:
Usluga u ovoj dentalnoj poliklinici je apsolutno vrhunska! Osoblje je izuzetno ljubazno i pažljivo.
Rad im je besprijekoran – od najjednostavnijih zahvata do zahtjevnijih tretmana, sve je izvedeno precizno i bez stresa. Posebno me oduševila higijena koja je na zavidnom nivou; sve je uredno, moderno i maksimalno čisto.
Zaista topla preporuka svima koji traže vrhunsku stomatološku brigu i ugodno iskustvo!

text.text:
Horrible experience, avoid!
Extremely unprofessional clinic with careless treatment and zero respect for patients. The service was terrible, overpriced, and left me feeling worse (!) than before which ruined the last days of my trip.
Do yourself a favor and stay far away from this place if you value your health .

text.text: The clinic charged €70! For a teeth cleaning which is more than i have seen others reported paying. My partner passed out from the pain whilst in the chair and the Dr let him leave and drive, that is incredibly irresponsible and medically negligent.

Recommending 100%.

text.text:
I can't say enough great things about my experience at Dental Clinic Kovačevič.

From the moment I arrived, I was treated with professionalism, kindness, and genuine care. The entire team  was warm and welcoming, and the clinic itself is modern, very clean, and calming — everything you’d hope for in a dental environment.

All 3 doctors truly changed my life. I came in hoping for a small improvement, but the aesthetic results went far beyond my expectations. The attention to detail, the precision, and the artistic touch transformed my smile. Every step of the process was explained clearly, and I always felt informed and supported.

The results are natural, beautiful, and truly life-changing.If you're looking not just for dental care but for a team that genuinely cares about how you feel inside and out, this is the place. Highly recommend!

The results are natural, beautiful, and truly life-changing.If you're looking not just for dental care but for a team that genuinely cares about how you feel inside and out, this is the place. Highly recommend!

text.text:
Really happy with my experience. Compared to Australia the pricing is so affordable, but that’s just where it starts.

This is the second time in my life I’ve done a major round of dental surgery. This time, I needed to change 3 veneers and 2 crowns that had hit the end of their lifespan.

Wow; things have certainly changed in dentistry. The level of technology that Nikola and father bring to the table is incredible. It really is an extremely modern surgery.

Whereas my previous round of surgery (15 years ago) was extremely tough physically, this was not.

Yes, I did experience discomfort but nothing extreme. The Kovacevic team - but especially Nikola, my primary dentist - have completely changed my imagery of dentistry .. and for the better.

The d"r did his job well, but in the treatment he felt thats its ok to put one of his tools on my body and not on his shelf.  this is definetly not the best experience that I had in a dental clinic, but not the worst either.

text.text: Some equipment was not clean. The doctor put his hand on my shirt, on the chair, went in/out of the room, touched my hands, and put his hands in my mouth wearing the same gloves. Terribly unhygienic.

text.text:
Prijatni i veoma stručni u svim oblastima vezanim za zdravlje zuba (ortodoncija, oralna hirurgija... ). Klinika u koju kad dođete možete potpuno da se opustite, jer jako brinu o svakom detalju, što je meni lično jako važno. Stalo im je da rezultat bude savršen osmjeh i da budete baš baš zadovoljni. 😃
Ja sam oduševljena iskreno. 😃

text.text: I decided to visit Dental Clinic Kovacevic whilst holidaying in Montenegro to get some bridging work done along with replacement fillings and a general touch up.  I cannot recommend the team here highly enough.  I was visiting from Ireland and initially made an appointment before I arrived into Montenegro.  They are a fantastic family team, super professional with great expertise.  My treatment was very thorough and efficient and in no way stopped me from enjoying a wonderful family holiday in Montenegro.  If you are staying near Igalo or Herceg Novi, the clinic in Zelenika is located nearby.  The team provide affordable dental treatment in a modern and welcoming environment.  Very happy to recommend and also had a great holiday too in Montenegro!

text.text: Odlazak kod stomatologa vise nije traumatican, obzirom da tim doktora koji cine mlade snage (Sanja i Nikola) a pod dirigentskom palicom profesora Krsta, rade sve da se osjecate kao da ste jedini pacijent na svijetu. Toliko paznje i zelje da se objasni i najsitniji detalj vas cini da se osjecate potpuno sigurno u njihovim rukama sto se na kraju i potvrdi kvalitetno odradjenim poslom! Ali, dzabe bilo sta pisati, najbolje je da ih posjetite i sami cete se uvjeriti. Sve preporuke!

text.text:
I am so happy to have found ‘Dental Clinic Kovacevic’.

Finally a clinic in Montenegro which combines great service and fantastic dentistry, in a clean modern surrounding.

From check-ups to laser teeth whitening, the team ensured my experience was as smooth and pain free as possible.

I highly recommend this place to all!
